de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Class JavaProgramElement

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ModelElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, SVSubstitute
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    EmptyStatement, JavaNonTerminalProgramElement, Literal, Modifier

    public abstract class JavaProgramElement
extends JavaSourceElement
implements ProgramElement
    Top level implementation of a Java ProgramElement. taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure

      JavaProgramElement(ExtList list)
      Java program element.

      creates a java program element with the given position information

      • match

        public MatchConditions match(SourceData source,
                             MatchConditions matchCond)
        Description copied from interface: ProgramElement
        matches the source "text" (@link SourceData#getSource()) against the pattern represented by this object. In case of a successful match the resulting MatchConditions with the found instantiations of the schemavariables. If the match failed, null is returned instead.
        Specified by:
        match in interface ProgramElement
        Parameters:
        source - the SourceData with the program element to match
        matchCond - the MatchConditions found up to this point
        Returns:
        the resulting match conditions or null if the match failed
